'''Shesharile''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was located within the [[Shesharile system/Legends|Shesharile system]], in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]].

A number of [[Moon/Legends|moons]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the large planet, two of which were able to support life. Known as the Twin Planets, their societies collapsed when the drug trafficker [[Shlith-dan]] introduced a fungus that was addictive to the inhabitants of both worlds.

{{Planet-stub}}
